lemmas.primary_translation: newly cut / recently appointed / newly minted

definitions.text: som nettopp er slått eller kuttet
definitions.translation: that which has just been mown or cut

definitions.text: som nylig er blitt eller utnevnt til noe
definitions.translation: that has recently become or been appointed to something
examples: de nyslåtte prisvinnerne ble feiret i rådhuset

definitions.text: som nylig er mynte eller preget
definitions.translation: that has recently been minted or struck
